---
title: "GenAI Tools Overview: Uses and Nuances"
---

{{< embed genai_banner.qmd >}}

[Generative AI](https://web.library.uq.edu.au/study-and-learning-support/ai-student-hub) (or "GenAI") refers to AI tools that use generative models trained to create different outputs, like text, images or videos.

This workshop introduces different Generative Artificial Intelligence tools and their applications in academic work and studies. Learn about effective prompting strategies, literature searching, ethical considerations for AI use in your studies and a variety of tools for specific uses.

* [Slides](https://github.com/uqlibrary/technology-training-assets/raw/master/GenAI/GenAI_Tools_Overview_-_Uses_and_Nuances.pdf)
